subcodes.first_line: This is the Day of Return and the Lord of all necks is established upon the Throne of Utterance and doth summon all the peoples of the world [3.5s]... ...Another letter of thine, which made mention of the hallowed and blessed days of Riḍván, was received.... Blessed is the house that hath attained unto My tender mercy... We have enjoined upon all to become engaged in some trade or profession, and have accounted such occupation to be an act of worship
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یوم ماب است و مالک رقاب بر عرش بیان مستوی و احزاب عالم را ندا میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the power of words; of speech, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @service to others; to the Cause of God
